ddls:
CREATE TABLE "guests" (
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each guest */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the guest */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the guest */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address for communication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for emergency or direct communication */,
  "loyalty_program_member" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the guest is a member of the loyalty program */,
  "preferred_language" TEXT /* Preferred language for communication */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the guest */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the guest */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stay_statistics" (
  "stay_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stay record */,
  "guest_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the guest associated with the stay */,
  "days_since_creation" INTEGER /* Days since the record was created */,
  "average_lead_time" INTEGER /* Average lead time for booking */,
  "lodging_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from lodging */,
  "other_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from other services */,
  "bookings_canceled" INTEGER /* Number of bookings canceled */,
  "bookings_no_showed" INTEGER /* Number of no-show bookings */,
  "bookings_checked_in" INTEGER /* Number of bookings checked-in */,
  "persons_nights" INTEGER /* Total nights per person stayed */,
  "room_nights" INTEGER /* Total room nights booked */,
  "check_in_date" TEXT /* Date when the guest checked in */,
  "check_out_date" TEXT /* Date when the guest checked out */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room type */,
  "booking_channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking channel */,
  "number_of_guests" INTEGER /* Number of guests in the booking */,
  "special_requests" TEXT /* Special requests made by the guest */,
  "room_service_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from room service */,
  "spa_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from spa services */,
  "restaurant_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from restaurant services */,
  "additional_services_revenue" REAL /* Revenue generated from additional services */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stay_statistics_booking_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_channel_id") REFERENCES booking_channels ("channel_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stay_statistics_guest_id FOREIGN KEY ("guest_id") REFERENCES guests ("guest_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "booking_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each booking channel */,
  "distribution_channel" TEXT /* Distribution channel used for booking (e.g., Direct, OTA) */,
  "market_segment" TEXT /* Market segment associated with the booking channel */,
  "commission_rate" REAL /* Commission rate for the channel */,
  "channel_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the booking channel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revenue_summary" (
  "revenue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revenue record */,
  "stay_id" INTEGER /* Reference to stay statistics */,
  "total_revenue" REAL /* Total revenue generated from the stay */,
  "lodging_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from lodging */,
  "other_revenue" REAL /* Revenue from other services */,
  "room_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the room type */,
  "booking_channel_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the booking channel */,
  "total_nights_stayed" INTEGER /* Total number of nights stayed */,
  "average_daily_rate" REAL /* Average daily rate for the stay */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revenue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_summary_stay_id FOREIGN KEY ("stay_id") REFERENCES stay_statistics ("stay_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revenue_summary_booking_channel_id FOREIGN KEY ("booking_channel_id") REFERENCES booking_channels ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Manager, Staff) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for logging into the system */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user's role */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
